The risk assessment also detected prominent anti-corruption program connected to noteworthy state affiliation creating foreign investment complications. Moreover, our analysis revealed concerning sanctions screening effectiveness alongside major government relationship exposure affecting anti-corruption compliance. Additionally, there are concerns about mid-level financial performance challenging profitability expectations. Additional indicators shows, notable observations were made regarding the company's digital protection measures. These findings necessitate thorough monitoring and stringent control measures.

Reviews:
	1. Name: Queen Raisa | Rating: 1
Amazon stole my money. They claimed they couldn't refund me my original payment. Although I returned that product in the cirrect timedrame. Issued a credit. I used it but the shoes were damaged. I sent the shoes back and they refused to issue me credit back. Claiming it was a one time use credit. I ordered new shoes. The agent knew that because they helped me place the order but she didn't tell me that. I would have used it on something that I was sure I was going to keep. I ordered 2 different sizes. I had never heard of Josmo before. Theey told me to contact Josmo. Even Josmo told them to replace or refund. I have canceled my membership and haven't ordered since. I don't have $22 to just throw away.

	2. Name: Amanda Gardner | Rating: 1
We are so DONE with Amazon! We have been waiting for a third shipment in the last 2 days. We received one last night and another one earlier today, with the third one still to be delivered today. My husband checked his account and it said that the third was attempted twice today. The first time neither one of us was at home, but we definitely were when they SUPPOSEDLY attempted again this afternoon, at 4:57 PM, and that they would “attempt again tomorrow”. We had Amazon call us through the help/contact part of their site. Did anyone know that they now email you a “password”, a 6 digit number, that you have to tell the driver when they come to your door? Well, that would have been all well and good, and we would have figured that out if the driver actually DID come to the door, but NO ONE DID! NO KNOCK! We have a dog that definitely would have alerted us if someone was here. The agent told me that they will “attempt” to deliver again tomorrow. I am livid, asked for a supervisor, and told him that we would be expecting the package TONIGHT, OR ELSE!!! We figure that that won’t happen, but my husband will be home tomorrow and waiting for another email (if that’s the new process, but who knows?) and another “attempt”. They had better deliver! We are canceling our accounts after that.

	3. Name: Tony McGarry | Rating: 5
Regarding prime membership I’ve been a member for many years since it cost $79 I think but Friday night when I saw Coldplay live stream from Seattle that was the best value added to membership ever! To live stream at home versus paying hundreds for tickets and driving hundred miles each way and parking etc. Amazon prime membership is the best. I’ve never had trouble with returns or missing Packages. And rarel need to use customer service and sometimes that is hit or miss it I think the people just Google the issue and I can do that myself.

	4. Name: toni chesneau | Rating: 1
I am a prime member in the USA.
I travel once a year for a month or so to Spain & happened to make a purchase there two years ago, since then, they made me a member of Amazon prime.es and they build me every month without my permission.
After not being able to cancel, or for that matter get a response from anyone, i cancelled my card, but they were able through my Amazon profile in the USA to get access to my new card and the story repeats itself.
Amazon USA said that I need to get in touch with Amazon Spain which is impossible.
And Amazon USA washes its hands from getting involved, what kind of corporate culture is your company promoting?
Is that the assistance you give to your customers?

Please acknowledge that your corporate image is being fraudulently charging every month for a second prime membership without my permission and they access my records kept with Amazon USA to update a reissued credit card so they can keep on billing me forever.

	5. Name: Taylor01 G | Rating: 1
Amazon used to be an amazing company with outstanding customer service. That has slowly changed.

I am ordering items that say they will be delivered in 2 days. After completing the sale, it then shows that I will have to wait extra days to receive my package. I am no longer able to cancel the sale because the item will not be delivered on time.

Now, for the second time this month, I have received empty packages- the item is missing. Customer service says the best they can do is issue a refund or wait an extra 5 days for delivery.
Outrageous!
